work_summary: Enhanced backend performance by introducing a structured caching layer using Redis for high-frequency read operations such as appointment listings and user dashboard summaries. Designed cache segmentation strategies to separate session-based data from transactional records. Implemented selective cache refresh mechanisms triggered by write operations to maintain synchronization between the in-memory store and the relational database. Conducted controlled performance benchmarks to evaluate throughput improvements under simulated concurrent user requests and documented observed latency reductions.
learnings: Improved understanding of designing layered backend architectures that balance speed and consistency. Learned how careful cache scoping and refresh strategies prevent stale data while significantly improving API responsiveness. Strengthened practical knowledge of integrating in-memory data stores into production-oriented backend systems.
blockers: Required additional testing to fine-tune refresh triggers for edge-case updates.

work_summary: Performed a structured analysis of database access patterns across booking and payroll modules to identify inefficiencies in query execution. Refactored ORM-level queries to minimize nested joins and redundant filters. Introduced targeted indexing for frequently accessed columns and validated improvements using test datasets representing real-world load conditions. Reviewed schema alignment with current business logic and adjusted column constraints to improve reliability and lookup speed.
learnings: Gained practical experience in database performance tuning and learned how indexing strategies must align with real query behavior rather than theoretical assumptions. Improved ability to profile backend performance bottlenecks and apply systematic optimization techniques.
blockers: Balancing improved read performance with minimal impact on write operations required careful testing.

work_summary: Configured a containerized development setup using Docker to standardize backend execution across team environments. Defined service isolation for application logic, database services, and caching layers. Structured environment variable handling for secure configuration management and ensured consistent dependency resolution inside containers. Validated cross-service communication and tested application startup sequencing to confirm stability under container orchestration scenarios.
learnings: Strengthened understanding of container-based development workflows and learned how environment isolation eliminates inconsistencies across systems. Improved knowledge of service orchestration, dependency management, and secure configuration practices in containerized applications.
blockers: Encountered minor configuration mismatches during initial service networking setup which were resolved through iterative testing.
